title: Failed Israeli mission to recover pilot’s remains leaves 41 dead in Lebanon
summary_full: An Israeli special forces operation in Lebanon's Bekaa Valley, targeting Nabi Sheet, aimed to locate the remains of missing airman Ron Arad. The overnight raid, involving air strikes and ground clashes, resulted in 41 deaths and 40 injuries, according to Lebanese health officials. Israel confirmed the operation's failure to find Arad's remains but reiterated its commitment to finding missing servicemen.
